case_title: PHILIP MEEKER VS. BREWPUB, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABLIITY et al

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MEEKER, PHILIP

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEEKER, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT BREWPUB, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABLIITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO BREWING COMPANY THE SAN FRANCISCO BREWING COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEEKER, PHILIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREWPUB, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABLIITY COMPANY DBA SAN FRANCISCO BREWING COMPANY THE SAN FRANCISCO BREWING COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $4,235.45 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,446.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ASSIGNEE.
